# Charles Chen — AI Product Builder

> Senior Product Manager who builds products at the speed of AI.

## About

Charles Chen is an AI Product Builder and Senior Product Manager. He has shipped products used by 6M+ users, driven 85% of company revenue, and accelerated team velocity 5x through AI integration.

## Core Expertise

- AI/LLM Product Development
- Product Strategy & Roadmapping
- AI-Powered Prototyping (Claude Code, Cursor)
- Full-Stack Development (React, TypeScript, Flutter, FastAPI)
- Data-Driven Decision Making (JTBD, RICE, Persona)

## Projects

### Path
AI-powered travel planning platform that generates personalized multi-day itineraries with real-time map integration. Built with Flutter and FastAPI.

### Plutus Trade
AI-powered Taiwan stock selection platform with real-time quotes, K-line charts, Gemini AI diagnostics, one-tap stock screening, and prediction tracking system. Built with Flutter, FastAPI, and Gemini AI.
URL: https://plutustrade.vercel.app/

### Product Playbook
AI-powered product planning skill for Claude Code with 22 frameworks, 6 execution modes, and automated dev handoff — from concept to spec in minutes.
URL: https://github.com/Kaminoikari/product-playbook

## Key Metrics

- 6M+ users impacted across shipped products
- 85% revenue contribution at previous company
- 5x faster product development velocity with AI tools
